summary: Miller soundboard capture delivers crystal‑clear audio, and the concert roars with standout Shakedown Street, Scarlet > Fire, and an all‑out All Over Now.
review: The Miller SBD source provides an excellent, crisp soundboard that lets every nuance shine. Fans rave about the high‑energy performance—Shakedown Street, the rare Throwing Stones > Day Job pairing, a scorching Scarlet‑Fire sequence, and an unforgettable All Over Now—all of which make this show a must‑listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the high‑quality Miller soundboard; only one neutral/ambiguous comment lowers the average slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Miller source noted as crystal‑clear, no reported dropouts or muddiness; listeners describe it as “awesome” and a “gem.”

standout_songs: Scar-Fire (Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain)
show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑octane, seamless flow with a daring Throwing Stones → Day Job segue and relentless energy throughout both sets.
